hero.headline: Green Today, Global Tomorrow
hero.subtitle: From castor fields of Gujarat to chemical plants worldwide — we deliver quality, integrity, and sustainable bio-based chemical intermediates.

about.title: About GreenChem Global

mission.visionText: Green chemistry driving global progress—sustainable bio-based chemicals for a better tomorrow.
mission.qualityDesc: Excellence in every product and service we deliver
mission.integrityDesc: Transparent, honest, and ethical business practices

ceo.quote: At GreenChem Global, we believe in the power of sustainable chemistry to drive global progress. Our mission is to provide high-quality, eco-friendly chemical solutions that enable businesses worldwide to innovate responsibly.
ceo.description: With 15+ years of experience in the chemical industry, our leadership team brings expertise and dedication to every product and partnership.
